title: Evergy Schedules Conference Call to Discuss 1st Quarter Results
text: KANSAS CITY, Mo.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Evergy, Inc. (NYSE: EVRG) announced today it will release its 2022 first quarter earnings Thursday, May 5, 2022, before market open. The company plans to host its quarterly conference call and audio webcast to discuss the results Thursday, May 5, 2022. Event: Evergy Q1 2022 Conference Call and Webcast     Date: May 5, 2022     Time: 9:00 a.m. Eastern (8:00 a.m. Central)     Location: 1) Phone conference call at (888) 353-7071, conference ID 4766027, or   2) Lo
